note: Mathlib/Order/Extension/Linear.lean:24 — 'Szpilrajn extension theorem: any partial order can be extended to a linear order', ∃ s, IsLinearOrder α s ∧ r ≤ s.
Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Diam.lean:40-41 — 'The eccentricity of a vertex is the greatest distance between it and any other vertex', def eccent (G) (u) : ℕ∞ := ⨆ v, G.edist u v.
Mathlib/FieldTheory/AbelRuffini.lean:330-333 — docstring literally '**Abel-Ruffini Theorem** (one direction): An irreducible polynomial with a solvableByRad root has a solvable Galois group.'
Mathlib/Analysis/Polynomial/MahlerMeasure.lean:81 — noncomputable def mahlerMeasure : ℝ := if p ≠ 0 then exp (p.logMahlerMeasure) else 0; file header 'Mahler measure of complex polynomials'.
Mathlib/Combinatorics/Enumerative/Pentagonal.lean:35 — def pentagonal (k : ℤ) : ℕ := (k * (3 * k - 1) / 2).toNat; docstring cites en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pentagonal_number directly.
